passiveAbilities.name: Lance
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to W. If this character deals Piercing Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Jousting Shield
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce Piercing and Impact Dmg suffered by -1.

activeAbilities.name: Chaaarge!!
activeAbilities.description: Move this model 4” directly towards target enemy model. If this character’s next action this turn is a Melee Attack against the same target it deals +2 Dmg.

activeAbilities.name: Foul Gases
activeAbilities.description: All models within the pulse suffer 2 Magical Dmg.

arcaneAbilities.name: Digger
arcaneAbilities.description:
When this model takes a Harvest action, flip an Arcane Card and reduce the Depth Value by X, where X is the value of the card.
Catastrophe: All models within a 3” pulse suffer 2 Magical Dmg.

signatureMove.name: Ankle Biter
signatureMove.passiveEffect: This attack deals W damage against models which are further than 1” away.
